/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main_new.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/noise.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/marching_cubes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/density_texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/voxel_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/gpu_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/game_menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/loading_screen.cpp.o -o game  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so _deps/raylib-build/raylib/external/glfw/src/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
